justification: Notre Dame News press release explicitly announces Pete Buttigieg joining Notre Dame Institute for Advanced Study as a faculty fellow in 2020, directly evidencing his affiliation with the university.
Senator Murphy's official Senate press release explicitly describes his participation in the Munich Security Conference AI panel 'Risks and Rewards of the AI Race', naming both parties.
Federation of American Scientists expert profile page for Tom Kalil directly documents his affiliation with FAS.
FedScoop article explicitly names Blumenthal as co-sponsor of the bill to create an AI risk evaluation program within the Department of Energy, documenting the legislative oversight relationship.
Stanford Digital Economy Lab publication page for The Digitalist Papers Volume 2 lists Sandy Pentland as a contributing author and faculty lead.
Axios article explicitly attributes the Congressional AI Framework eight-point plan to Alex Bores and describes it as his authored policy agenda for Congress.
White House official page for the December 2025 executive order on AI federal preemption; David Sacks' authorship/orchestration is widely documented in contemporaneous coverage referencing this EO.
Knight First Amendment Institute page publishes the essay 'AI as Normal Technology' and explicitly credits Arvind Narayanan as co-author.
Knight First Amendment Institute page publishes the essay 'AI as Normal Technology' and explicitly credits Sayash Kapoor as co-author alongside Narayanan.
Wikipedia article on The Entrepreneurial State explicitly identifies Mariana Mazzucato as the sole author of the 2013 book.
MIT Shaping the Future of Work page for Power and Progress explicitly names Daron Acemoglu as co-author of the book.
MIT Shaping the Future of Work page for Power and Progress explicitly names Simon Johnson as co-author of the book alongside Acemoglu.
Michel Justen's Substack page is the primary publication venue for 'A Guide to the AI Tribes', explicitly crediting him as author.
Transformer newsletter page explicitly publishes 'The Left is Missing Out on AI' and credits Dan Kagan-Kans as author.
Amazon listing for 'Dignity in a Digital Age' explicitly names Ro Khanna as author of the 2022 book.
